notes:
docs: add DATABASE.md with data-location findings and DB access guide

Document that app data lives in the Render-hosted PostgreSQL (not locally),
the likely causes behind the "saved client disappeared" issue, and a
practical guide for inspecting/editing the database (GUI clients, Android
Studio plugin, psql, Render dashboard) plus backup/restore and safe-delete
notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
